problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE expressions reference port names without proper variable declarations or bindings
problems.minimal_edit: Replace port references with valid AGREE expressions using visible identifiers or remove invalid clauses

executor_steps: Identify all port references in the AGREE annex that do not resolve to valid AGREE variables or parameters
Replace each invalid port reference with a valid AGREE expression or remove the clause if no valid replacement exists
Ensure the remaining AGREE expressions are syntactically valid and refer only to visible identifiers
